_comment: Season configuration — edit values here, restart server. No code changes needed.

xp._comment: XP curve: xpForLevel(n) = baseXP + (n-1) * xpPerLevel. Level 1 requires 0 XP.

matchRewards._comment: XP awarded per match based on outcome and performance.

prestige._comment: After hitting maxLevel, players can prestige to reset level and earn prestige badges.
